directCases.name: offset preserves string literal that looks like a reference
directCases.invariant: Only coord token A1 shifts; the string token remains byte-equivalent after quote re-escaping.

directCases.name: offset intentionally shifts sheet-qualified references
directCases.invariant: OffsetFormulaCoords does not honor sheetref and shifts both coords; this preserves current fill/paste behavior.

directCases.name: adjust skips sheet-qualified references
directCases.invariant: AdjustFormulaCoords sets sheetref after ! and skips the sheet-qualified A1 while shifting local B1.

directCases.name: replace skips sheet-qualified references
directCases.invariant: ReplaceFormulaCoords skips the sheet-qualified A1 but replaces local B1.

directCases.name: offset preserves absolute column and row markers
directCases.invariant: A leading $ locks the column and a later $ locks the row.

directCases.name: adjust deletion turns removed refs into REF
directCases.invariant: Refs in the deleted column band become #REF!, while later refs shift backward.

directCases.name: replace preserves absolute markers
directCases.invariant: Replacement copies original absolute markers onto the target coordinate parts.

directCases.name: whole-column names are not rewrite coordinates
directCases.invariant: Whole-column N:T spellings parse as name tokens, not coord tokens.

directCases.name: whole-column AA stays name while AA1 shifts
directCases.invariant: AA in AA:AA is a name token; AA1 is a coord token.

directCases.name: range endpoints are rewritten independently
directCases.invariant: Current ReplaceFormulaCoords has no whole-range extent move; only mapped endpoint A1 changes.

directCases.name: doubled quotes survive re-emission
directCases.invariant: Inner quote bytes are doubled on output.

directCases.name: operator expansion preserves comparator spelling
directCases.invariant: Current JS parser compresses >= to G then TokenOpExpansion re-emits >=; Rust preserves spelling directly.

directCases.name: <> operator expansion preserves not-equal spelling
directCases.invariant: Current JS parser compresses <> to N then TokenOpExpansion re-emits <>; Rust preserves spelling directly.

directCases.name: adjust sheet-qualified range Sheet1!A1:B1 unchanged when sheetref persists across colon
directCases.invariant: Leanstral counterexample: ':' does not reset sheetref; both endpoints skipped on adjust (JS behavior to preserve).

directCases.name: offset still shifts sheet-qualified range Sheet1!A1:B1
directCases.invariant: OffsetFormulaCoords ignores sheetref; contrasts with adjust on same formula.

directCases.name: adjust keeps whole-column names while shifting trailing coord
directCases.invariant: Whole-column names are never coords; adjust still shifts refs at or after the insertion anchor.

directCases.name: adjust delete skips sheet-qualified coord while local ref becomes REF
directCases.invariant: With sheetref active after !, SHEET2!B1 is skipped; the local B1 in the deleted column becomes #REF!.

directCases.name: offset composition succeeds when intermediates stay valid
directCases.invariant: Matches offset(1,1) followed by offset(1,1); documents the safe composition path.

directCases.name: offset composition first leg invalid yields REF
directCases.invariant: Documents the unsafe composition boundary; once a rewrite produces #REF!, later offsets keep #REF!.

directCases.name: adjust diagonal insert rewrites each absolute marker independently
directCases.invariant: Structural adjust shifts the underlying coordinate even when offset-style absolute markers are present, then reapplies each marker.

directCases.name: replace keeps sheet-qualified A1:B1 range when endpoints are mapped but sheet-sticky
directCases.invariant: Sheet-qualified range after ! is not rewritten even when A1 and B1 appear in movedto; local C1 still replaces after + resets sheetref.

directCases.name: adjust wide column delete turns in-band refs to REF and compacts later refs
directCases.invariant: Deleting two columns from col 2 invalidates B1 and C1 while D1 shifts back to B1.

commandCases.name: filldown offsets refs while preserving HTML quotes
paste offsets local ref but leaves whole column and string literal
